headline: Coca-Cola Stock's Loudest Signal Is The One It Stopped Saying
summary: The company is celebrating a new 'balanced' growth model, but its quiet de-emphasis on pure pricing power arrives just as margins show their first real crack in years.

raw.headline: Coca-Cola Stock's Loudest Signal Is The One It Stopped Saying
raw.summary: The company is celebrating a new 'balanced' growth model, but its quiet de-emphasis on pure pricing power arrives just as margins show their first real crack in years.

headline: 2 Nasdaq 100 Stocks Worth Your Attention and 1 We Brush Off
summary: The Nasdaq 100 (^NDX) is known for housing some of the most innovative and fastest-growing companies in the market. But not every stock in the index is a winner - some are struggling with slowing growth, increasing competition, or unsustainable valuations.

raw.headline: 2 Nasdaq 100 Stocks Worth Your Attention and 1 We Brush Off

headline: 'Halftime' traders debate the market setup for the next half of 2026
summary: CNBC's "Halftime Report" team debate the end of the quarter and discuss their trading strategy heading into the second half of the year.
